ckks_minus_plaintext_ndcg_at_10_canonica.interpretation: Non-inferiority uses the lower endpoint; equivalence requires the complete interval inside the symmetric margin. An interval containing zero alone is inconclusive about equivalence and no rule establishes superiority.

ckks_minus_plaintext_ndcg_at_10_evaluabl.interpretation: Non-inferiority uses the lower endpoint; equivalence requires the complete interval inside the symmetric margin. An interval containing zero alone is inconclusive about equivalence and no rule establishes superiority.

actual_ckks_evaluable_subset.subset_validity: Exact subset of independent per-query CKKS requests; no cross-query state, training, aggregation, or cryptographic replay is required.

confirmatory.canonical_metric_policy: Queries whose sole positive document is absent from the official corpus are retained with zero metrics.
